series_metadata.series_title: Notices to suspend credentials from Child Support Enforcement Agencies
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule pertains to notices received by the Division to suspend or reinstate an individual''s credential for child support reasons even though the individual did not maintain or no longer maintains a credential issued by the Division. This retention schedule includes, but is not limited to, the notice received by the Division and correspondence related to the notice. These notices may contain social security numbers that are confidential pursuant to State ex rel Beacon Journal Publishing Co v. Kent State, 68 Ohio St. 3d 40, 43.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Records maintained in paper form shall be maintained on-site for three years from the date of receipt by the Division. Then the paper records shall be destroyed. ; Electronic: For any records maintained in machine readable format, the records shall be maintained on-site for three years from the date of receipt by the Division. Then the machine readable records shall be destroyed. ; Microform: For any records maintained in microform, the records shall be maintained on-site for three years from the date of receipt by the Division. Then the microform shall be destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
